title: Instagram Brand Growth
description: Viral reel strategy took a Mumbai skincare brand from 2K to 85K followers in just 4 months with zero paid spend.
caseInfo: We audited the brand's existing content, rebuilt their visual identity, and launched a 5-reels-per-week strategy with hook-led scripts. Every reel followed our proven 3-second hook → value → CTA framework. Week 4 saw a 12M-view viral reel that accelerated growth overnight.
result: 2K → 85K followers in 4 months. 12M+ views on a single reel. DM inquiries up 9x.

title: D2C Brand Meta Ads Scale
description: Meta Ads restructure delivered 200% more conversions at identical ad spend for a Delhi skincare D2C brand.
caseInfo: The client was spending ₹80,000/month on Meta Ads with a 1.4x ROAS. We rebuilt the entire account structure — new creative testing framework, Advantage+ Shopping campaigns, and a 3-tier funnel (TOF, MOF, BOF). The new framework hit 4.6x ROAS within 8 weeks without increasing the budget.
result: ROAS 1.4x → 4.6x. Conversions +200%. CPL reduced by 38%. Same monthly budget.

title: SaaS B2B Lead Generation
description: Google PPC campaign for a Bangalore B2B SaaS company that delivered 5.1x ROAS and cut cost-per-lead by 40%.
caseInfo: The SaaS client was burning budget on broad match keywords with no negative keyword list. We rebuilt from scratch — exact match keyword clusters, competitor bidding strategy, custom landing pages per ad group, and full conversion tracking via GTM. In 6 weeks, qualified demo bookings tripled.
result: 5.1x ROAS. CPL down 40%. Demo bookings 3x. Churn reduced as lead quality improved.

title: Local Business SEO Domination
description: Took a Pune dental clinic from page 4 to #1 on Google for 12 high-intent local keywords in 5 months.
caseInfo: The clinic had no Google Business Profile, duplicate citations, and a 4.8s page load time. We executed a full local SEO overhaul — technical fixes, 40+ local citation buildout, GMB optimisation with weekly posts and review management, and a content cluster targeting every service + location combination. Organic appointment bookings increased by 4x.
result: Page 4 → #1 for 12 keywords. Organic traffic +340%. Appointment bookings 4x. GBP views 6x.

title: FinTech SaaS WebGL Redesign
description: Premium corporate SaaS landing page redesign utilizing WebGL, GSAP micro-animations, and a robust design system.
caseInfo: The SaaS startup faced a high bounce rate on their primary marketing site. We redesigned the user journey from scratch using an immersive dark theme, custom interactive financial models, and sleek 3D WebGL cards. Using GSAP ScrollTrigger, we built micro-animations that explained the dashboard features interactively as the user scrolled.
result: Lighthouse score 42 → 99. Bounce rate cut by 55%. Product demo signups increased by 140% in 30 days.

title: eCommerce Shopify Store Launch
description: Custom mobile-first Shopify store for a luxury fashion brand generating 180% more revenue from day one.
caseInfo: The old website took 8.4 seconds to load on mobile, had no trust signals, and a 7-step checkout. We rebuilt on Shopify — mobile-first design, 1.8s load time, UPI + COD payment integration, exit-intent popups, and a Klaviyo email flow for abandoned carts. The new store's conversion rate was 4.1% vs. the old site's 0.9%.
result: Mobile load: 8.4s → 1.8s. CVR: 0.9% → 4.1%. Revenue +180% in launch month. Cart recovery 22%.

title: AI Chatbot & Lead Automation
description: Implemented custom Gemini-powered chatbots and automated sales proposal funnels for a D2C streetwear clothing brand.
caseInfo: The brand wanted to automate customer inquiries and qualify site visitors. We built an interactive AI chatbot that answers questions in Hinglish, extracts lead info, and sends it directly to a custom CRM dashboard. The system automatically drafts and dispatches customized strategy proposals via email to prospective buyers.
result: 84% customer questions automated. Lead volume +210% in 30 days. Auto email proposals generated 18 new client calls.
